description_long: This apple is round with a slightly irregular, natural shape and a short, brown stem protruding from the top. Its skin displays a blend of pale yellow and pinkish-red hues, with the coloration appearing mottled and streaked across the surface. The apple's surface is smooth with a subtle sheen, indicating freshness and a waxy outer layer typical of many apple varieties. There are no visible blemishes, bruises, or stickers on the skin, and the stem is intact and slightly curved. The apple appears plump and firm, suggesting it is ripe and ready to eat. Its size and coloration are consistent with common varieties found in urban markets and parks.
description: A round, pinkish-red and yellow apple with a smooth, slightly glossy skin and a short brown stem.
description_view_0: The apple shows a dominant pinkish-red side with a visible stem and subtle yellow streaks.
description_view_1: This view highlights more of the pale yellow area, with the stem angled toward the viewer.
description_view_2: A balanced mix of pinkish-red and yellow is visible, with the stem slightly off-center.
description_view_3: The apple appears mostly pinkish-red with a smooth, unblemished surface and the stem upright.
